arts.ttl: I made a huge mistake for Manchester United and everybody still talks about it 20 years later
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Roy Carroll spent four years at Man Utd - and he's still asked about the mistake he made against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Manchester United get major Antoine Semenyo transfer update as Rayan Cherki stance emerges
arts.sum: The latest Man Utd transfer news and gossip with updates on AFC Bournemouth forward Antoine Semenyo and Lyon playmaker Rayan Cherki.

arts.ttl: I left Manchester United when they wanted me to stay - now I'm a travel agent
arts.sum: Following spells in Slovakia and Hungary, former Man United midfielder James Weir now finds himself working as an independent travel agent.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford future decided as Harry Maguire makes plea
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking towards the summer transfer window and hope to secure some top-quality players, with potential qualification for the Champions League a major incentive

arts.ttl: Inside Man United's comeback for the ages: Star's pre-match DJ role, Ruben Amorim's message to players and a 'devastated' away dressing room
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: The front page of Le Progres summed up the mood in Lyon yesterday. Nuit de folie, tristesse infinite. Night of madness, infinite sadness.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's back-up transfer plan emerges as Ruben Amorim waits on £100m deal
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is demanding a major overhaul at Manchester United in this summer's transfer window after a miserable season for the Red Devils, with several targets identified

arts.ttl: Nicky Butt 'is cautioned by police as ex-Man United star is revealed as the man who headbutted a security guard after being spotted urinating against a wall at his 50th birthday party'
arts.sum: Butt is alleged to have attacked the guard during the event at Soho Farmhouse near Great Tew, Oxfordshire in January.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'at head of queue' for £70m ambipedal attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United are at the head of the queue to sign a highly-rated Bournemouth star in the summer transfer window, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts surprise Europa League winner after Man Utd & Tottenham battle through
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham, Athletic Club and Bodo/Glimt will battle it out for a place in the 2024/25 Europa League final.

arts.ttl: Man Utd legend Nicky Butt handed police caution after incident at 50th birthday party
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and England midfielder Nicky Butt had held his 50th birthday party at the trendy Soho Farmhouse in Oxfordshire, where guests included David and Victoria Beckham, Paul Scholes and Gary Neville
